TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[722.850-1086.150] interviewee: And in the back, naturally, the Germans. We didn't know what to do. Our colonel said to us, stay here. I'm going for new orders. And we will see what we have to do.
[1086.150-1198.870] interviewee: And we were waiting for him. And I'm waiting up today for him. He never showed up. Maybe he got killed. Maybe he was caught or he ran away. We don't know. No sign about it. So we younger officers-- we decided to dissolve the formation. We told

He never
